creator: culot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

thanks for submitting this patch.
However it appears to be incorrect as shown by the following tinderbox run:

http://people.freebsd.org/~culot/tinderbox/7.4-FreeBSD/p5-XML-RPC-Fast-0.7-error.log

I propose the following patch instead:

http://people.freebsd.org/~culot/files/p5-XML-RPC-Fast.diff

Here are the modifications I applied:

- Missing manpages were added to MAN3
- pkg-plist was updated
- p5-WWW-Curl dependency was added as proposed in ports/155998
- PORTREVISION was removed

Tinderbox logs corresponding to this patch can be found here:

http://people.freebsd.org/~culot/tinderbox/7.4-FreeBSD/p5-XML-RPC-Fast-0.7.log
http://people.freebsd.org/~culot/tinderbox/8.2-FreeBSD/p5-XML-RPC-Fast-0.7.log
http://people.freebsd.org/~culot/tinderbox/9.0-FreeBSD/p5-XML-RPC-Fast-0.7.log

Vladimir if you approve my patch I will commit it otherwise feel free to
provide your feedback.

Thanks,
culot@
